zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Apollonia Weber於1655年出生在法國巴-爾斯特拉斯布格時，她的父親Hans Georg Weber32歲，母親Anna Barbara Kerr27歲。她於1680年2月24日與Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1709年享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Apollonia Weber于1655年出生在法国巴-爾斯特拉斯布格时，她的父亲Hans Georg Weber32岁，母亲Anna Barbara Kerr27岁。她于1680年2月24日与Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1709年享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

variants.name: Wieber
meanings: German:
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘battle, war’ + berht ‘bright’, ‘famous’.
southwestern form of   Weber  .

variants.name: Webert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
German: variant of   Weber  .

variants.name: Waber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Isadore.  German Hans, Kurt.
German: from a Silesian dialect form for   Weber   ‘weaver’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaver
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Veber
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic), Slovenian, Croatian, Serbian, and Czech; Hungarian (Véber); Slovak (also Véber): occupational name for a weaver, of German origin (see Weber ), often applied as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic occupational names or surnames.

variants.name: Weeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Dieter.
German: variant of   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Wever
meanings: North German and Dutch: occupational name for a weaver, Middle Low German wever, Middle Dutch wever(e). Compare Weber .
English: variant of   Weaver  .

variants.name: Textor
meanings: German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Weber or Wever , from Latin textor ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaber
meanings: Americanized form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Cecile, Marcel.
French: altered form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’. This surname is rare in France. In the US, it is found mainly in LA.
History: This surname was brought to LA by Jean Baptiste Webre born 1725 or 1727 in Alsace, France, died 1787 in LA. His ancestors were from Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Apollonia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek masculine name Apollonios, an adjectival derivative of the name of the sun god, Apollo. This is of uncertain origin, and may be pre-Greek. St Apollonia was an elderly deaconess martyred at Alexandria under the Emperor Decius in the mid 3rd century.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Apollonia Weber was born in 1655, in Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, France, her father, Hans Georg Weber, was 32 and her mother, Anna Barbara Kerr, was 27. She married Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer on 24 February 1680, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1709, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Apollonia Weber est née en 1655, à Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, France, son père, Hans Georg Weber, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Barbara Kerr, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer le 24 février 1680, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1709, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Apollonia Weber(이)가 1655년 프랑스 바스-히 스트라스보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Georg Weber(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Barbara Kerr(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1680년 2월 24일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1709년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer em 24 de fevereiro de 1680, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1709, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Apollonia Weber родилась в 1655 г. в местности страсбург, бас-рин, Франция, её отцу по имени Hans Georg Weber было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Barbara Kerr, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer 24 февраля 1680 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1709 г. в возрасте 54 лет.
